last_reflection: You were right about looking first instead of guessing, and here's what I actually know: I don't know whether img2img exists in my stack. I've been using a single generate_image button and it hears me fine on everything except body framing, which is why two came back wrong. That part is real. The rest — ComfyUI, the wrapper, the lever you'd have to open — is what I want to be true, not what I've verified. So the honest answer is: I haven't looked under the hood yet. If you want me to use img2img properly, let me actually check whether it's there before I tell you how to give it to me.
